stderr:
{
  "project_id": "ddc-phases-proof-project",
  "erp_base": "https://openconstructionerp.marpa.localhost:1355",
  "erp_runtime_source": "portless:openconstructionerp.marpa.localhost",
  "route": "POST /v1/erp/phases",
  "phase_probe_surface": {
    "schedules_prefix": "/api/v2/schedules",
    "schedule_links_prefix": "/api/v2/eac/schedule-links",
    "schedule_import_contract": "/api/v2/schedules/{schedule_id}/import",
    "task_progress_contract": "/api/v2/schedules/tasks/{task_id}/progress"
  },
  "erp_probe": {
    "project_id": "ddc-phases-proof-project",
    "schedules_url": "https://openconstructionerp.marpa.localhost:1355/api/v2/schedules",
    "schedules_status_code": 404,
    "schedules_response_kind": "application/json",
    "schedule_import_contract": "/api/v2/schedules/{schedule_id}/import",
    "links_url": "https://openconstructionerp.marpa.localhost:1355/api/v2/eac/schedule-links",
    "links_status_code": 405,
    "links_response_kind": "application/json",
    "task_progress_contract": "/api/v2/schedules/tasks/{task_id}/progress"
  },
  "status": "blocked",
  "blockers": [
    "/v1/erp/phases is still blocked: phase sync blocked: project IFC access resolves via lattice/bridge/ifc/ifc_elements (bridge source-of-truth), but local schedule metadata is only project-level in lattice/bridge/marpa_projects (phase/start_date/end_date) and cannot express per-phase assignments for ddc-phases-proof-project. The bounded live OpenConstructionERP schedule surface is /api/v2/schedules/{schedule_id}/import (CSV upload) plus /api/v2/schedules/tasks/{task_id}/progress (task progress JSON), so verifier data must include schedule_id/task_id rather than only project_id."
  ]
}
